programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Peruvian Alien Skull and Baltic Sea UFO
programme.desc: In Peru a tiny skeleton resists medical explanation and some believe it is either a missing link in human evolution, or proof of extra-terrestrial contact. In the Baltic Sea wreck detectives find a huge disc on the seabed.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: America's Haunted Highway
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: When two Yellow Cab drivers are murdered in under a week, the city of Houston is thrown into a frenzy. Detective Fil Waters soon learns that there are recordings of the same female voice luring the drivers to their deaths.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff's deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight. When he's found dead in his patrol car the next morning, his fellow lawmen must set aside their grief and hunt down his killer.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: The Eastside Killer
programme.desc: A twisted murderer preys on young women in Bellevue Washington, leaving their bodies sadistically posed. As police work to draw a crucial connection, an unconventional clue surfaces and leads them to an unlikely killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Shelia Dates and her daughter Regina are more than blood relatives: they're best friends and roommates too. But one morning, their lives are irrevocably changed the moment two unexpected guests appear at their doorstep.

programme.title: Torture, Obsession, and Murder
programme.desc: On a quiet summer afternoon in 1984, an off-duty police officer happens upon a minor theft in progress. Soon, the investigation takes a sharp left turn into a sinister world of torture, obsession, and cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: In His Father's Footsteps
programme.desc: The ambush of 22-year-old college student Richard Bailey on October 20, 2008, leaves a community desperate for answers. With no forensic evidence left at the scene, detectives turn to surveillance footage to track down Richard's killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: So Hateful
programme.desc: When 46-year-old Anthony Edwards is found shot in the park, his family has no idea who would want to bring harm to a man that was loved by so many. Using modern technology and forensic testing, detectives are determined to bring his killer to justice.

programme.title: Torture, Obsession, and Murder
programme.desc: On a quiet summer afternoon in 1984, an off-duty police officer happens upon a minor theft in progress. Soon, the investigation takes a sharp left turn into a sinister world of torture, obsession, and cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: In His Father's Footsteps
programme.desc: The ambush of 22-year-old college student Richard Bailey on October 20, 2008, leaves a community desperate for answers. With no forensic evidence left at the scene, detectives turn to surveillance footage to track down Richard's killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Great Don Lewis
programme.desc: Donald Lewis is a popular musician who owns a local Jazz Cafe. Despite being beloved in the community, mystery strikes when he suddenly disappears from his jazz club along with his employee. Detectives must find the both of them before it's too late.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: Tammie Craycraft Smith, a 30-year-old recent divorcee, finds herself working two jobs to make ends meet. But Tammie's trusting nature and desire to be loved leave her vulnerable to deception, betrayal, and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Dangerous Game
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Mandy Boardman is courted by a man twice her age, David Wise, who played on her softball team. It seemed she had met her perfect match. After the pair wed, it wasn't long before Mandy realized David was playing a vile game of his own.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Campus Creep
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Kari Rogers lived her life in the fast lane. So in 1991 when her friends introduced her to 18-year-old Lonnie Keith, the two moved quickly and got married. But Kari quickly found out that Lonnie had many dirty little secrets.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: He's No Angel
programme.desc: Holley Angel was focused on raising her two girls. But even Holley could not ignore the sparks flying between her and a co-worker named Brian. 10 years later, a confession will reveal a betrayal that drags Holley and her family through a living hell.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Malicious Woundings
programme.desc: Joyce Sowa gave up her independence when she fell for a real estate agent named Bryant Parker. The couple soon wed - but it wasn't long before Bryant's charm wore off. His anger escalated, and soon their troubles left Joyce with a bleeding heart.

programme.title: Guilty Rich: A Deadly Ambition
programme.desc: Scott Rothstein is the darling of Florida's glitterati, a high-flying lawyer who lives larger than life. But the world he's built is an illusion of lies... and it comes crashing down when his illicit secret to success is exposed.

programme.title: Guilty Rich: The Millionaire an the Model
programme.desc: An aspiring model finds love and a runway to success in her vitamin tycoon husband. But behind the money and the make-up is an ugly truth... and when the marriage fails, with millions at stake, each wants the other out of the picture - forever.

programme.title: Behind Mansion Walls: Covet and Kill
programme.desc: We all envy the lifestyle of the rich. But for some, jealousy can turn into pure obsession. Instead of counting their own blessings, these people crave someone else's life.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: When Cody MacPherson moves to New Jersey to look for work, he falls in with a new group of friends. After a late night of partying, he disappears without a trace. Six months later, this missing persons investigation soon turns into a homicide.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Deadly Love Nest
programme.desc: Housemates Jenny, Jake, and Steve share everything, including each other's beds. But when one is brutally attacked, police uncover a nest of lies, jealousy, and betrayal. This leads them to ask: was it really an intruder… or was it an inside job?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed Miss Brown Sugar
programme.desc: When 21-year-old Erica Vassell disappears after a Super Bowl party in Clewiston, Florida, the town launches an immediate search. But when her brutally murdered body is discovered days later, everyone in the tiny glades town is left in shock and fear.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: A night of partying by fraternity brothers ends with a knock on the door and gunfire. One student is dead, three are wounded, and a freshman freely admits he was the shooter. He claims it was self-defence. But others say he was looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: The Evil Inside
programme.desc: At work, Kerri Harris and her friend discover a camera secreted in the ladies' restroom. Police examine the evidence, but less than 24 hours into their investigation, Kerri is found stabbed to death in her office. Her co-workers are just feet away.

programme.title: My Murder Story: The Secrets We Keep
programme.desc: The investigation of a tragic murder leads to long hidden family secrets, as detectives uncover a man living a double life.

programme.title: Shattered: The Box
programme.desc: 1996. A father in Texas seeks revenge for the savage dismemberment of his son... a girl in Mississippi desperately tries to escape the metal footlocker she has been imprisoned in... and a rookie detective is assigned a case that will define his career.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: A Strange Trust
programme.desc: When 16-year-old BFFs Dawn Donaldson and Crissy Campbell vanish overnight, the residents of Grass Valley, California, fear for their children's safety. Rumors fly, from runaways to abduction. Detectives must find them before their worst fears come true.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Capital of Deception
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas where Mobsters once ruled and casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. Find out why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for the Atomic Bomb, and a meeting place for terrorists.

programme.title: Founding Fathers: Masters of Deceit
programme.desc: Discover which of America's founding fathers was a master of deceit, which one used sex as an instrument of diplomacy, which one secretly scoffed at the divinity of Jesus, and which one engaged in the greatest cover-up in all of American history.

programme.title: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: Explores the idea of aliens helping to build the pyramids and other ancient monuments. Swiss author Erich von Daniken's books on religion and science may have influenced the idea of these ancient astronauts.

programme.title: America's Zombie Army
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, the United States of America searches for a way to create a generation of super soldiers who use telepathy to win battles. In the 1950s, gangster Whitey Bulger volunteers for the CIA's LSD project known as MK-Ultra.

programme.title: Founding Fathers: Masters of Deceit
programme.desc: Discover which of America's founding fathers was a master of deceit, which one used sex as an instrument of diplomacy, which one secretly scoffed at the divinity of Jesus, and which one engaged in the greatest cover-up in all of American history.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Capital of Deception
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas where Mobsters once ruled and casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. Find out why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for the Atomic Bomb, and a meeting place for terrorists.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: Hollywood vs. Commies
programme.desc: The amazing story of how Hollywood took on Communism and played a key role in winning the Cold War.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.desc: Steven and Jennifer have been burned by a bad home inspection before and decided to upgrade to a new house, confident that it would have fewer problems. Now they need Mike to do a Holmes Inspection to bring the rest of their problems to light.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Acres of Pain
programme.desc: Jason and Kim were thrilled to be able to buy their dream house, an unusual design built on three acres. Once they moved in, they began to realize they had much more serious safety issues than were clear in their home inspection report.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Timberville House
programme.desc: The dawgs salvage a 1900s farmhouse in the heart of the Shenandoah Valley. Along with the usual doors and hardware, they find ornate ceiling medallions, a clawfoot tub and pine flooring. A built-in cabinet yields a potential treasure.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way. He's challenged with finding a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while still making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Restored: 1906 Arts and Crafts House
programme.desc: Brett is called upon to restore a historically significant 1906 arts and crafts home. He brings it back to its original glory by reintroducing the closed-in fireplaces, re-instating the floor plan and replacing the 1980s kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Neoclassical Victorian
programme.desc: Brett helps an engaged couple restore their Victorian home, including a new kitchen and bathroom before their big wedding day. Brett begins work on the kitchen, removing additions and wallpaper.

programme.title: Restored: 1900 Victorian Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their big 1900 Victorian Farmhouse in time for their wedding. They're hoping he can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms closed off by past modifications.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ponds Have More Fun
programme.desc: A Texas family wants a one-of-a-kind, natural-looking cocktail pool. The guys prove they are masters of the country pond when they build an expansive creek waterfall, natural rock steps, sunken boulders and custom concealed skimmers.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: They say everything's bigger in Texas, and the pools are no exception. The Pool Kings are facing a big backyard and even bigger expectations from their interior design client.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean and Classic in Corona
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Corona, California, to help a big extended family that's running low on living space. They design a clean, geometrical pool with an artistic fountain wall, fire features and a killer barbecue area for everyone to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool
programme.desc: Vic and Yukari had to leave their beloved pool behind when they moved into a California community. Brian and Paul must create an epic pool in the couple's new, small space, and the design includes an exposed acrylic wall holding back water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Gotta Have My Grotto
programme.desc: A young family from Carlsbad, California wants a nice backyard where the kids can play. Mike and Jim are up for the challenge and build a power-packed pool with a spa, underwater volcano, custom slide and a Tuscan grotto.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Eyesore to Elegance
programme.desc: After renovating a fixer-upper into their dream home, a couple is ready to add the final touch by restoring the old pool. Paul and Brian Porter create a modern oasis by adding an infinity edge spa, fire bowls and a luxury barbecue area.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Desert Oasis in Sin City
programme.desc: Mike Baldasare and Jim Bellamy, two best friends that build award winning pools for clients all across the southwest, head to Las Vegas to build a dream pool for Shane and Willow Jager's brand new dream home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Broken to Beautiful
programme.desc: After living with a broken pool for four years, a family decides to build their dream pool again. Brian and Paul Porter give them an out-of-this-world creation, featuring a waterfall wall, sunken fire pit and poolside spa.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eating Las Vegas
programme.desc: Noah Cappe investigates the Great American Foodie Fest in Nevada.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The King Crab and I
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits the Alaska State Fair, which is older than the state itself! He tries some local fresh seafood and state secrets, including the sasquatch sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzel-a, Queen of Dessert
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Crystal River, Florida, for the Florida Manatee Festival, where he tries the OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Classics Gone Wild
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe crosses the country in search of carnival classics gone wild! From a pumped-up corndog at the Porter County Fair to an out of this world funnel cake-blooming onion mashup at the Greater Gulf State Fair.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases some of the best of coastal cuisine in a top 15 countdown of the most delicious dishes inspired by America's oceans, lakes and rivers. There are wasabi salmon burgers in Alaska, crab cakes by the Chesapeake Bay and more in between.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Carb Overload
programme.desc: It's time to ditch the protein and reach for the carbs in this over-the-top tour of foods to satisfy any carb craving. The trip includes a pizza topped with pasta and a grilled cheese filled with spaghetti, potato doughnuts and stuffed pretzels.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Hog Wild
programme.desc: From humongous German-style pork shanks in Philadelphia to pork-powered pizzas in Boston.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Orlando
programme.desc: Jordan Andino's in the Sunshine State to check out the late night food scene in Orlando. His first stop is downtown for some delicious Colombian cuisine at Super Rico Colombian Bistro. Then he's off to Dixie Dharma, which offers up Southern food.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Calgary
programme.desc: Jordan Andino heads to Calgary, Alberta which is a mecca for eats after dark. For happy hour in the trendy Mission District, there's nowhere better than Anejo Restaurant, where Jordan tries some of the most authentic tacos he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tacos
programme.desc: Americans love tacos, and Roger Mooking is scouring the country for the 15 best tacos around. The options for fillings range from pork to fish to alligator in hard, soft and even puffy shells.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Local Legends
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best dishes that have achieved local legend status. From sentimental favorites like deep-dish pizza, patty melts and spaghetti and meatballs to an old-fashioned clambake and lobster roll.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Fish and Fowl
programme.desc: In North Bend, Ore., Chef Roger Mooking meets up with Don Ivy, Chief of the Coquille Tribe. Roger and Don roast a school of salmon for a traditional tribal feast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: The Salt and the Sea
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is spending the day at Jacobsen Salt Co., in Netarts Bay, Oregon, one of the largest producers of handcrafted sea salt in America. Owner Ben Jacobsen takes Roger on a tour of the facility, showing him how to smoke sea salt.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Me In Texas
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking sees that everything is bigger in Texas, first meeting Pit Master Levi Goode at Armadillo Palace in Houston. On Levi's custom rotisserie trailer, they roast a 250-pound side of beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: One-of-a-Kind Rigs
programme.desc: Roger meets Josh Pollack, owner of Rosenberg's Bagels & Delicatessen in Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Sizzling Steaks
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets Tom Perini at his restaurant, Perini Ranch Steakhouse in Buffalo Gap.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Viva! Vienna! Festival/ Contra Band Days Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Virginia for creamy crab dip and discovers the secret to authentic crawfish gumbo in Louisiana.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Oak Mountain Spring State Fair/ Apache Rattlesnake Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is crazy about fried bread pudding bites in Alabama. He then gets bitten by a fried rattlesnake in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Portland Rose Festival and Got to Be NC Fair
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe is in Portland to try beef tongue tacos. He then heads to North Carolina for a donut sloppy Joe.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Doggin'
programme.desc: Noah visits Maryland for a crab dip smothered dog; California for a cheesy, spicy Chile Relleno dog and a dessert dog covered in whipped cream and chocolate.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Better With Bacon
programme.desc: Everything's better with bacon and Noah Cappe is here to prove it. Noah travels to festival and fairs across the country, Noah finds the biggest, baddest and best bacon dishes around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ice Cream Dreams
programme.desc: Noah samples ice cream sensations from sweet to savory. Whether it's piled on top of delicious homemade donuts, or snuggling in-between bacon wafers, these ice cream dream dishes will have you begging for more.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Flavor Mashups
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds that marrying different dishes to create something new is a genius life hack. Whether it's a combination of cultures or a surprising mix of your favorite flavors, a good mashup is an exciting way to bring your meal to the next level.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson explores a world of flavors and an all-time favorite, Asian cuisine. Whether sweet or spicy, classics or fusions, there's always something new to try when it comes to Asian sensations.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Cheat Day

programme.title: Food Paradise: Bodacious Bowls

programme.desc: A ghost town covered in a strange, white powder emerges from a lake in Argentina. When a lost jungle is discovered in Africa, scientists embark on a dangerous mission to explore it. A declassified CIA image uncovers a bizarre, giant Soviet weapon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Desert Shipwrecks
programme.desc: Hundreds of shipwrecks are found in the middle of a desert in Africa. Then, visit a ghost town where hundreds of its inhabitants have mysteriously died. Also, something strange happens in North Korea.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dagger of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: A dagger sealed in the tomb of King Tut for more than 3,000 years is made of a metal that seems to have extraterrestrial origins. A massive swastika is found in the desert near Roswell. Satellites hunt for the world's most wanted man, Joseph Kony.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Medusa
programme.desc: Experts investigate a strange glowing lake reported to turn things into stone. A mysterious structure in Africa that resembles Stonehenge is said to be the resting place of a mythical giant. A dark conspiracy could be at work in the Australian outback.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding King Arthur
programme.desc: An abandoned megacity in a remote jungle might be the home of an ancient treasure and a dark secret. When a mysterious circular stone structure is discovered in Scotland, experts investigate whether it's the fabled Round Table of King Arthur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain
programme.desc: Satellites discover American stealth technology deep inside China. An unidentified cloud swamps America's skis. Finally, something truly massive is lurking beneath Loch Ness.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Bloodlust
programme.desc: When an officer pulls over a reckless driver in a routine traffic stop, he unlocks the key to a series of murders. Investigators from various jurisdictions work in tandem to track a sadistic killer with a penchant for torture, robbery, and bloodlust.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Lake Erie is home to more than 2,000 shipwrecks mostly due to it's shallow bottom. For local fisherman, Chris Leclair, navigating a double life proves just as treacherous. When his wife, Karen uncovers his dark secret he's caught in a net of lies.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Last Party
programme.desc: A wild party ends in terror as a bright, young mom's cries for help fall on deaf ears. When detectives retrace her final steps they find a trap with no way out.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: What Happened to Lauren?
programme.desc: When a 27-year-old law student is reported missing and investigators later find a human torso in the trash can behind her apartment, it's undeniable that the two are related. Police in Macon, Georgia must act fast to catch a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: I'm Not Moving
programme.desc: A man returns from a work stint out of state to find that his neighbor has taken over his property to run a chop shop, resulting in an intractable feud that engulfs two families, and doesn't end until one of the combatants lies dead.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Don't Know Why He Spared Me
programme.desc: Thirty years on, Sharon Morris still wonders why former boyfriend Tony Fiebiger didn't kill her when he had the chance. There was a time when she felt only love for Tony, but as his sick crimes are revealed, she's grateful she's alive to talk about it.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: What Happened to Lauren?
programme.desc: When a 27-year-old law student is reported missing and investigators later find a human torso in the trash can behind her apartment, it's undeniable that the two are related. Police in Macon, Georgia must act fast to catch a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: I'm Not Moving
programme.desc: A man returns from a work stint out of state to find that his neighbor has taken over his property to run a chop shop, resulting in an intractable feud that engulfs two families, and doesn't end until one of the combatants lies dead.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Last Blanco
programme.desc: Michael Blanco never doubted the violent things his mother did were to keep their family safe until one day he learned the truth.

programme.title: Homicide City: Nine Months Murdered
programme.desc: When expectant mother Natise Johnson is found murdered days before she is due to give birth to her first child, Philly detectives focus on those closest to her. But soon they find Natise's life is much more complicated than anyone ever knew.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Big Sky Murder
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 when she finds her husband shot to death. The investigation reveals allegations of harassment from the victim's ex-lover and eventually uncovers a complex trail of deceit, in a murder that was years in the making.

programme.title: Murder Calls: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: When a man calls 911 screaming for help but too terrified to give his address, police scramble to find him. As detectives investigate, they uncover a shocking tale of torture and revenge one that proves that unrequited love can be deadly.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Lucifer
programme.desc: Dawnia Dacosta attends nursing school, while working the late shift. After work, she stops at church for evening services. One night, she runs out of fuel, and walks to the nearest station. Then a man in a van offers a ride back to her car.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: You Could Be Next
programme.desc: Theories arise when a sheriff's wife opens a door to a blaze of gunfire. When more citizens are shot at their front doors, everyone's left wondering who's next.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Mind Games
programme.desc: Jennifer Holliday is driving along a Texas highway at night when she is viciously blind-sided. From out of nowhere, a shotgun blast nearly severs her arm and as she frantically tries to recover, her attacker's reign of terror is only just beginning.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Devil in the Dance Hall
programme.desc: A murder within the small square dancing community of Texarkana, Arkansas leads investigators through a gauntlet of suspects with alibies and potential motives- including love triangles, jealousy and lots of money.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: Dead Before Sunrise
programme.desc: The death of a prominent charity fundraiser leaves a tiny Kentucky community reeling. Investigators find themselves brushing shoulders with criminal biker gangs in pursuit of the killer and discover a twisted motive that shocks everyone.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Secret
programme.desc: Debra Coffey and Melissa Lewis are best friends working together at a prestigious law firm in Ft. Lauderdale, Florida. When Melissa is found brutally murdered in a canal, Debra is consumed with guilt as a dark secret is revealed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in Aspen
programme.desc: When an Aspen legend who once dated Jack Nicholson and Michael Douglas is killed in her sleep, everyone in the upscale resort town wants to know why and who did it.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Old Flames Die Hard
programme.desc: Sharmon Intili believes she's met the man of her dreams. Her friends think otherwise. A messy breakup and the rekindling of an old flame puts into play a calculated plan to wipe out the competition.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Fire Inside
programme.desc: When a serial arsonist murders four people in a California hardware store, fire investigators Marvin Casey and John Orr both become obsessed with the case. As fires continue to burn across the state, the two are pushed to their limits to stop the killing.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: An investigation on the murder of a mother focuses on her violent husband until a jailhouse snitch reveals new information.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Games of Homes
programme.desc: New neighbours disrupt the harmony that has existed between residents for years. Alliances change and terror reigns until a winter storm puts a bloody end to the feud.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Hunting a Lone Wolf
programme.desc: The FBI's in a race against time once an IED is discovered along a Spokane, WA parade route. It's a hunt that will take them all across the Pacific Northwest for a lone wolf suspect before he tries to strike again.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Hunting a Lone Wolf

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs but when his brother David realized who was the Unabomber, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.desc: After saving for years, a couple of former teachers are splurging on the perfect pool for their new house in Austin, Texas. The nature lovers want a great view with sounds of waterfalls and space for family to visit.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lone Star State Update
programme.desc: After spending years living all over the world, Teresa and Jeremy find the perfect vacation home for their family in their home state of Texas. They're ready to put down roots, but their new lakefront home is in need of some TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Modern Farmhouse Fix-up
programme.desc: In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work. They hope their budget is enough to give them the open floor plan and modern farmhouse look they desire.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big Reno With Astounding Views on Apple Valley Lake in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple customizes an Ohio lakefront home for their large family.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Missouri
programme.desc: Empty nesters leave snowy Indiana and find a large home on Lake of the Ozarks. The couple has a big renovation budget and wants to update the home to accommodate all their expected visitors. Unfortunately they soon discover a setback during demolition.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Travel to Los Angeles, where the weather is warm and the local food is fantastic.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Memphis
programme.desc: From sweet deals on steak dinners at The Butchershop, to the guilty pleasure of indulgent surf and turf at Iris, Memphis is home to some of the best food you'll ever eat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago Neighborhoods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the neighborhoods that make Chicago a culinary treasure trove. From handcrafted burgers in the West Loop to street-style tacos in Wicker Park and barbecue chicken served up in Bronzeville.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: North Carolina's Triangle
programme.desc: Andrew digs into Raleigh, Durham and Chapel Hill- three tasty cities that make up North Carolina's Triangle. A hub for higher education with a booming tech industry, this region is home to a blossoming food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hollywood
programme.desc: Andrew explores legendary hotspots and diverse culinary treasures in Hollywood, California. He highlights classic steak and martinis, Thai steamed whole fish, Armenian flatbread topped with minced beef and Persian ice cream.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Portland

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Other Florida

programme.title: Fire Masters: A Blaze of Glory

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Zejdz Zmoich Wlosow
programme.desc: When an earthquake bursts the water pipes in Judith's home, Alan invites her to say with him at Charlie's.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Giant Cat Holding a Churro
programme.desc: When Alan struggles to come to terms with Lyndsey's risqué movie past, Walden tries to cheer him up by throwing a party at the house.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: While attending a Phillies baseball game, Murray says Adam is old enough to leave his seat on his own. When a nervous Adam leaves, he immediately gets flustered and gets lost at the stadium.

programme.title: Mom: Esta Loca and a Little Klingon
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie help get Jill sober again, and Christy's boyfriend is less than understanding when it ruins his birthday weekend.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Mike Advises Mandy
programme.desc: Mike offers Mandy advice on how to set aside money to pay the taxes on her struggling online clothing business. But she decides to do it her way by opening up a pop up store at Bud's Buds.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Big Shots
programme.desc: Mike finds himself in the middle between Kristin and Ryan when it’s discovered that Boyd was never vaccinated for chicken pox.

programme.title: Mom: Pilot
programme.desc: A newly sober single mother is trying to get her life together. She is challenged when her estranged mother, Bonnie comes back into the picture.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Doggonit /No Gear
programme.desc: A dog bite, an eviction, and a withheld security deposit; Man sues over clothes damaged.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Unknowingly Evicted/ Shame on You and My Body
programme.desc: A breached sublet agreement; woman sues over lost wages and medical expenses.

programme.title: Protection Court: Fantasy and Fetish/ Argued Over Insurance
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Naming Right/ Roommate Ruckus
programme.desc: A son sues his father for using credit card without permission; roommates argue over a deposit.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Lindsey vs. Dannenbrink
programme.desc: A 35-year-old California woman comes to court to find out if a long-time friend of the family is also her biological father.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Hunter vs. Holden
programme.desc: A Florida auto mechanic suspects his live-in girlfriend had another man's baby and is only with him for his money.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Vicki and Ronald are suing Ted for property damage. Ted says he went above and beyond in cleaning and fixing the house before leaving, and owes the plaintiffs nothing.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A man is suing his ex-girlfriend for the value of a car and claims she is hostile and abusive and once tried to run him over with her car.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'I Want My Money & I Want it Now ' and 'Losing Control.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Pooping on a Cousin.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: What About the Flower Girl?/ Southbound and Down
programme.desc: A dispute over wedding party expenses; woman seeks reimbursement for faulty moving truck.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Donny is suing Nigel over the return of a sick dog and veterinarian bills. Nigel says that because he didn't breed the dog and has nothing to do with its allergies, he owes Donny nothing.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Why Did You Get A 15 Year Old Pregnant?
programme.desc: Brittney is only 16 years old and she has a 4-month-old son. She’s here because her boyfriend, Eric, believes he’s not the baby’s father but claims that the doubts surrounding the child all come from Brittney’s family.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Out and Proud
programme.desc: Jaylin wants to take things up a notch with her boyfriend Curtis but he isn’t ready for that just yet. Alex wants his friend Taylor to take him more seriously but she has reasons why she hasn't accepted his affection. DiDi wants to steal Mekeia from Vik.

programme.title: Maury: I Have Eight Brothers ... Will a DNA Test Prove I Have a Sister?
programme.desc: Buster and his brother Slimm are denying Buster's the father of Breanna's baby. Dawn is here to find out if Tamara is her sister. Brittany cheated on Deshawn, and now Deshawn questions the paternity of her baby.
